name: Ritual of the Matador
name_jp: マタドール<ruby lang="jp"><rb>降</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>臨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>儀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>式</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ダーク・パセオ
name_jp_rom: Matadōru Kōrin no Gishiki - Dāku Paseo
name_jp_tl: Ritual of the Matador's Advent - Dark Paseo
desc: This card can be used to Ritual Summon "Matador Archfiend". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 6 or more. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 non-Ritual "Archfiend" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Ritual of the Matador" once per turn.
eff: This card can be used to Ritual Summon "Matador Archfiend". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 6 or more. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 non-Ritual "Archfiend" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Ritual of the Matador" once per turn.

banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
